params.prompt: Photorealistic editorial interior reference photograph of a Taste. Focus tightly on: kitchen cabinets, range hood, kitchen island or counter, compact kitchen island — 48in x 24in, pale oak base 'Warm Sand' (#D2BFA3) with honed light-grey quartz countertop (#6A736A), integrated 12in overhang. Styled in japandi aesthetic, warm_neutral palette, soft_ambient lighting. A calm, minimal Japandi palette tuned for a young family — warm neutrals, low-profile furniture, and a few sculptural, tactile accents. Prioritize organic textures, soft ambient light from practical fixtures and windows, and a compact, child-friendly layout with a discreet standing-desk work corner in the bedroom. This image is a visual consistency reference — every detail of the featured furniture and fixtures must be clearly visible and precisely rendered. No people. No visible brand logos. Sharp architectural photography. Luxury real estate staging.
